After each attack, the user must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} penalty or gain +{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and immediately suffer an extra instance of damage from it.

After each attack, the user must pass a Toughness resistance test with a −{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} penalty or gain +{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} levels of toxin and immediately suffer an extra instance of damage from it.

languages.text: При каждом совершении атаки персонаж выполняет проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Выносливости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со штрафом −{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} и в случае провала получает +{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} уровней {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}отравления{/g}. Также урон от этого эффекта немедленно наносится дополнительно.
languages.original_text: After each attack, the user must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} penalty or gain +{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and immediately suffer an extra instance of damage from it.

traits.locale_text: При каждом совершении атаки персонаж выполняет проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Выносливости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со штрафом −{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} и в случае провала получает +{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} уровней {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}отравления{/g}. Также урон от этого эффекта немедленно наносится дополнительно.

При каждом совершении атаки персонаж выполняет проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Выносливости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со штрафом −{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} и в случае провала получает +{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} уровней {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}отравления{/g}. Также урон от этого эффекта немедленно наносится дополнительно.

languages.text: Después de cada ataque, el usuario debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}resistencia{/g} con una penalización de −{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} o ganar +{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} niveles de {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxina{/g} y sufrir inmediatamente sus daños.
languages.original_text: After each attack, the user must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} penalty or gain +{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and immediately suffer an extra instance of damage from it.

traits.locale_text: Después de cada ataque, el usuario debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}resistencia{/g} con una penalización de −{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} o ganar +{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} niveles de {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxina{/g} y sufrir inmediatamente sus daños.

languages.text: Nach jedem Angriff muss der Nutzer eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Zähigkeit{/g} mit einem Abzug von −{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} bestehen, um nicht mit +{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} Stufen {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Gift{/g} belegt zu werden und sofort eine zusätzliche Instanz Schaden zu erleiden.
languages.original_text: After each attack, the user must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} penalty or gain +{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and immediately suffer an extra instance of damage from it.

traits.locale_text: Nach jedem Angriff muss der Nutzer eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Zähigkeit{/g} mit einem Abzug von −{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} bestehen, um nicht mit +{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} Stufen {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Gift{/g} belegt zu werden und sofort eine zusätzliche Instanz Schaden zu erleiden.

languages.text: Après chaque attaque, l'utilisateur doit réaliser un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Endurance{/g} avec une pénalité de -{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35}. En cas d'échec, il reçoit +{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} niveaux de {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Toxine{/g} et subit immédiatement une instance supplémentaire de dégâts de cet effet.
languages.original_text: After each attack, the user must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} penalty or gain +{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and immediately suffer an extra instance of damage from it.

traits.locale_text: Après chaque attaque, l'utilisateur doit réaliser un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Endurance{/g} avec une pénalité de -{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35}. En cas d'échec, il reçoit +{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} niveaux de {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Toxine{/g} et subit immédiatement une instance supplémentaire de dégâts de cet effet.

languages.text: Kullanıcı, her saldırıdan sonra −{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} ceza puanına sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Dayanıklılık{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde {uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} seviye {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toksine{/g} uğrar ve anında bu etkiden ek bir hasar silsilesine maruz kalır.
languages.original_text: After each attack, the user must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} penalty or gain +{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and immediately suffer an extra instance of damage from it.

traits.locale_text: Kullanıcı, her saldırıdan sonra −{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} ceza puanına sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Dayanıklılık{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde {uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} seviye {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toksine{/g} uğrar ve anında bu etkiden ek bir hasar silsilesine maruz kalır.

languages.text: 每次攻击后，使用者必须通过一项带有{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35}减值的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}坚韧{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，否则受到{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35}层{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒素{/g}效果，并立即额外受到一次该效果造成的伤害。
languages.original_text: After each attack, the user must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} penalty or gain +{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and immediately suffer an extra instance of damage from it.

traits.locale_text: 每次攻击后，使用者必须通过一项带有{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35}减值的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}坚韧{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，否则受到{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35}层{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒素{/g}效果，并立即额外受到一次该效果造成的伤害。

languages.text: 攻撃のたびに、攻撃者は−{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35}のペナルティで{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}強靭さ{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}耐性チェック{/g}に成功するか、+ {uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35}レベルの{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒{/g}を付与され、その毒によるダメージを即座に受ける。
languages.original_text: After each attack, the user must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} penalty or gain +{uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35} levels of {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} and immediately suffer an extra instance of damage from it.

traits.locale_text: 攻撃のたびに、攻撃者は−{uip|DC|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35}のペナルティで{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}強靭さ{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}耐性チェック{/g}に成功するか、+ {uip|Toxin|9240ed9f123d4fa69f44e9c24d6e1b35}レベルの{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒{/g}を付与され、その毒によるダメージを即座に受ける。
